description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte black label and metallic silver top. The front of the can features bold, blocky white text with a gold outline, advertising a pale ale and referencing its establishment in 1880. The sides and back of the can display additional information, including serving suggestions, brewery location in Tampa Bay, and a brief description of the beer's heritage and quality. The can's top is equipped with a classic pull tab for opening. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on strong typography and subtle gold accents. The can appears unopened and in pristine condition, suitable for display or consumption.
description: A matte black aluminum beer can with bold white and gold typography, silver pull tab, and minimalistic label design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with large white text and gold outline, highlighting the beer's name and type.
description_view_1: Side view displaying serving suggestions and a brief quality statement in smaller white text.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional product information and a continuation of the gold border design.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the brewery location, alcohol content, and a short description of the beer's heritage.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a matte black background with bold, blocky white typography outlined in gold, and minimalistic gold border accents. The design is clean and modern, focusing on strong text and subtle color contrasts without elaborate imagery.
